meaning: n.显著,卓越,明显,突出,突起
examples: The answer is the salience attribute.
Another important aspect of a rule is the optional salience attribute.
So, the value of the salience attribute for this rule is the lowest one: 10.
Once the salience of the event declines so too will interest and motivation to change.
The salience detection network also may go awry in anxiety, schizophrenia and other conditions, says Dr. Uddin.
